description: You are a critical care nurse in a cardiac intensive care unit. Patient Jesse Becker (DOB: 1943-02-04, 83-year-old male) was admitted 48 hours ago following a non-ST elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI). Based on recent rounds and consultations, document a moderate severity allergy to Codeine (reaction: nausea and vomiting), add Type 2 diabetes mellitus to his active problem list as a confirmed condition, and order a Creatinine (serum) test to monitor his renal function. Login: admin / Admin123. OpenMRS URL: http://localhost/openmrs/spa

metadata.occupation_context: Critical Care Nurse — cardiac ICU, post-NSTEMI documentation
